---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Instructorships

* Basic Social Statistics (UMN SOC 3811)
  + Fall 2021

* Sociology of Neighborhoods (UMN SOC 3081) - Temporary
  + Spring 2017 

## Teaching Assistantships

* Advanced Social Statistics (UMN SOC 8811)
  + Spring 2016, 2017, and 2018
  
* Intermediate Social Statistics (UMN SOC 5811)
  + Fall 2015
  
* Introduction to the Criminal Justice System (UMN SOC 3101)
  + Spring 2015
  
* Basic Social Statistics (UMN SOC 3811)
  + Fall 2014
  
## Planned Courses
  
 * Quantitative Methodology and Statistics ([syllabus](syllabi/larson_syllabus_draft.pdf))
